thenoname.name: THE NONAME無名
thenoname.bio: The NONAME is a Chinese punk rock institution with nearly 30 years of history. Here comes a blast of the hottest punk rock import from the Far East—straight from Xi’an, China! Masterminded by vocalist and band head honcho Ray, who is sick and tired of the ruling order, he finds his kind of freedom in music by starting his own revolution against all false hope in the world. Furthermore, these maniacs show their tough attitude straight to people’s faces and fight against all limits. Their music can be described as a mix between pure 1980s punk rock and straight hardcore, with heavy guitars, groovy bass lines, and powerful vocals. THE NONAME creates a wall of sound to scream along with; this music is the kind of revolution Ray wanted and hoped would never stop inspiring.

onikali.name: ÖNIKA LI
onikali.bio:
ÖNIKA LI (ÖNIKΛ) is an independent artist whose creative approach centers on reinterpretation and sonic transformation.
Rather than replicating existing styles, they deconstruct familiar energy and rebuild it through electronic textures, emotional contrast, and futuristic sound design.
Moving across reggae influences, Synth Pop, Synthwave, and other evolving electronic territories, ÖNIKA LI reshapes raw rock and punk attitudes into cold, sharp, and emotionally charged soundscapes.
Their work goes beyond tribute—each release acts as a reimagining, translating spirit and intensity into a new auditory language for contemporary and future-facing listeners.

bigdandthekidstable.name: BIG D & THE KIDS TABLE
bigdandthekidstable.bio: Big D and the Kids Table is a ska punk band formed in October 1995 in Boston, Massachusetts, when its members converged in college.Their first release was on their own Fork in Hand Records label,but have since teamed with Springman Records and SideOneDummy. The band has been noted for its strict DIY work ethic,such as engineering, producing, and releasing their own albums and videos and self-promotion of their own shows.
